custom.title: Design your own piece
custom.sub: Upload your idea — a photo, sketch, logo, or just a description — and together we turn it into a shirt or painting that feels like you.
custom.priceNotice: Final pricing for custom pieces is confirmed after design review — depending on complexity, colour count, size and production method. We send you the price and timing before any work starts.

shirt.title: Custom shirt
shirt.desc: Your design on heavy cotton — pick the cut, colour and placement.

painting.title: Custom painting
painting.desc: From your photo to a piece: printed, hand-painted, or artistically interpreted.

other.title: Something else
other.desc: A mural, gift, logo, painted notebooks… tell us your idea.

fields.placementHint: You can pick more than one spot
fields.styleQ: How should we treat your image?
fields.otherHint: Any other art request: a mural, painted notebook, special gift, logo design…
fields.otherPh: e.g. I want a small mural for my kid's room in calm colours, about a metre wide…

print.desc: Full colour and fine detail — best for photos and colourful artwork.

embroidery.desc: Raised thread that lasts years — best for logos, letters and linework.

printed.desc: A high-quality archival print of your image as-is.

hand.desc: Rabea paints it by hand on your chosen surface.

interpret.desc: Your image re-imagined in Rabea's own style.

upload.dropTitle: Drag your images here, or click to browse
upload.instructionsPh: e.g. the logo centred, palm-sized, in gold thread…
upload.errorSign: Could not prepare {name} for upload — try again
upload.errorRejected: {name} was rejected — check its type and size

review.estLineShirt: Rough guide only: ~{amount} — final depends on the design.
review.estLineOther: We send the final price and timing after reviewing the design.

validation.customSize: Enter width and height for the custom size
validation.placementRequired: Pick a placement — front, back, or sleeve
validation.uploadMinOne: Upload at least one image so we can see your idea

success.title: Your custom piece was added to the order
success.sub: Complete your details on the order page so we can review the design and send you the price.

empty.title: Your order is empty
empty.sub: Add a ready piece from the shop, or start a custom design from your idea.

review.title: Review your order
review.manualNote: {count} piece(s) are priced manually after design review — added to the total later.

form.title: Your details & delivery address
form.sub: We use this only to contact you and deliver the order. No payment is requested now.
form.consentCustom: I understand custom pieces need Rabea's approval, and the final price or delivery time may change after review.
form.submitHint: Submitting sends your order for review — we contact you before any work or payment.
form.errorBanner: Check the fields marked in red, then submit again.
form.agreeTermsError: You must agree to the terms

confirmation.title: We received your order
confirmation.greeting: Thanks {name}! We will review it and contact you via {method}.
confirmation.next1: We review your order within 24 working hours.
confirmation.next2: We contact you via {method} to confirm price and details.
confirmation.next3: Once you approve, we start the work and arrange delivery & payment.
confirmation.waMessage: Hi! I'm {name}, I just submitted order {ref}

errors.validation: Please check your details and try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts in a short time — try again shortly.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again, or contact us directly.
errors.productNotFound: One of the products in your order is no longer available — remove it and try again.
errors.invalidOption: One of your selected options is no longer available — review your order and try again.
errors.customOtherDisabled: Open art requests aren't available right now — please contact us directly.
